title: A2UI under the hood: Designing for the new era of radically adaptive UI
description: An optimistic exploration of how AI can enable truly adaptive interfaces that respond to user context and behavior. A practical guide for designers navigating the emerging paradigm of AI-assisted UI design.

title: You got faster. Your company didn't.
description: This thought-provoking essay challenges the assumption that AI tools increase productivity, arguing instead that speed gains are offset by distributed costs across organizations. A critical read for design leaders evaluating AI adoption and its real impact on team dynamics.

title: While everyone talks about AI, design is gaining power
description: Major tech companies are elevating design from a support function to a strategic priority while the industry focuses on AI hype. This shift signals a fundamental change in how organizations value UX and product design leadership.

title: The architecture of focus
description: This essay exposes how manager-centric scheduling systematically destroys the deep work required for quality design and product development. Essential reading for leaders redesigning team structures and work rhythms.

title: The AI layoff trap
description: This interactive simulation reveals a critical market dynamics trap: competitive pressure drives over-automation where individual firms capture savings but industry-wide demand destruction goes unpriced. Vital for product and business leaders understanding AI's macroeconomic effects.

title: DESIGN.md Best Practices
description: As AI-assisted UI design becomes mainstream, DESIGN.md files are emerging as critical documentation for maintaining consistency and context. Learn best practices for structuring design systems in the age of AI tooling.

title: The web we know is going to disappear
description: A historical perspective arguing that each generation of computing overestimates the longevity of its preferred interface, offering important context for designers investing heavily in current platforms. Challenges assumptions about web-first strategy.

title: Tabnxt
description: An AI-powered tab manager that intelligently suspends resource-heavy background tabs addresses a real pain point in modern browsing. Represents practical AI application solving tangible productivity friction.
